arts.ttl: Compared: Leeds, Sheff Utd, Burnley, Sunderland fixture difficulty
arts.sum: After that, Leeds return home to face Oxford United, one of only two sides that are yet to taste victory on their travels – then two away games come after Christmas Day, at Stoke City on Boxing Day evening, then to Derby County. arts.ttl: Preview: Preston North End vs. Leeds United - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Preston North End and Leeds United, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Leeds Want to Sign Star With ‘Magic in his Boots’ From Champions League Club
arts.sum: Leeds United have joined a host of English clubs in the race to sign in-form Aston Villa forward Louie Barry in the January transfer window.

Preston got the better of Cardiff in a tight contest in south Wales on Wednesday night, bringing an end to a difficult run of form. The Lilywhites were winless in nine Championship outings prior to ...

arts.ttl: Paul Heckingbottom not happy as he reveals Leeds United advantage before a ball is kicked
arts.sum: Leeds United travel to Preston this weekend looking to make it a nine-point week after back-to-back home wins against Derby County and Middlesbrough. It’s often that we see Daniel Farke lamenting the scheduling of Leeds’ several Sky Sports televised fixtures in the Championship, often travelling up and down the Championship at inconvenient times solely for the benefit of the broadcasters.

arts.ttl: Leeds United's promotion rivals rocked by injury bombshell before Swansea City trip
arts.sum: Sunderland head coach Regis Le Bris has today delivered an update on Tommy Watson's injury situation, revealing the youngster is expected to miss around "two months" following an injury sustained recently. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: Player’s Leeds contract causes exit hesitation – Seems to be changing his mind
arts.sum: Max Wöber’s contract at Leeds United is one of the reasons he is unlikely to depart in the January transfer window. That’s according to journalist Peter Linden on his official website, who says a move to RB Salzburg isn’t in the pipeline for the time being. arts.ttl: Beren Cross's Leeds United notebook as Tanaka and Gnonto turn more heads and cup tickets available
arts.sum: The 26-year-old was voted Player of the Match for Leeds' triumphs over Plymouth Argyle and Luton Town and contributed significantly to the team's four-game winning streak. Following the midfielder's victories in October and November, Leeds United supporters have chosen Ao Tanaka as their JD Sports Player of the Month for the second consecutive month.

arts.ttl: No James or Tanaka: Leeds United man named in EFL Team of the Week
arts.sum: Leeds United winger Willy Gnonto has been named in the EFL Championship Team of the Week for his goalscoring display against Middlesbrough. All three of Leeds’ goalscorers, Willy Gnonto, Dan James, and Brenden Aaronson had good games against Middlesbrough on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Paul Heckingbottom blasts 'foolish' Championship schedule ahead of Leeds United challenge
